_delete_after_bootstrap: Delete ALL keys prefixed with '_' (including this one, _instructions, _example) after populating with real data. These are guides, not data.

_instructions.match_id: Corresponds to 'match_id' in schedule.json. Required for scoping predictions to the correct match, especially when teams meet multiple times.
_instructions.predicted_score: User's scoreline, e.g. '2-1'. null until user predicts.
_instructions.actual_score: Final result, e.g. '2-1'. null until match concludes.
_instructions.points: Points awarded per scoring rules. null for pending matches.
_instructions.status: One of: pending, correct_exact, correct_winner, wrong_winner.
